title: Introducing Langy: Your Automated AI Engineer
excerpt: Langy is an automated AI engineer inside LangWatch: it reads your traces, writes Scenario tests and evaluations, opens PRs, and proves every fix in your CI.
content_html:
Today we are launching Langy, an AI engineer that works inside LangWatch. It is a full coding agent: it reads your production traces, writes Scenario tests and evaluations against what it finds, connects to your GitHub, opens a pull request on your actual codebase, and proves the change by running the simulations it wrote in your CI. You talk to it where your evaluation results already live, and what comes back is a diff with green checks attached.

The first thing we did with it: we plugged Langy into a robot over MCP and asked it to test our own customer-support voice agent. It kicked off the Scenario simulations itself.

AI has pushed software into work it never used to touch. Agents are doing legal work, health work, financial work, and the engineers building them are not lawyers, doctors, or bankers. The domain expert matters more to a software team than ever, and yet on most teams they still cannot contribute a change: any agent valuable enough to do that work is complex, with an evaluation pipeline and a scenario suite behind it, and improving it means touching code and having the AI engineering expertise to do it well.

Every platform in this market, ours included, promised that collaboration. In practice the domain experts still collaborate through spreadsheets and Slack messages, and the engineers became the bottleneck for every hypothesis anyone else wants to try. Engineers do not want that job either; nobody becomes an AI engineer to translate other people's prompt tweaks.

Langy is our answer. What changed to make it possible is that coding agents got genuinely good, while LangWatch grew into the platform where agent testing, evaluation, and improvement already happen. When your agents get complex, the work lives in two places at once, the platform and the codebase, and Langy is at home in both. A PM or domain expert describes what the agent should do differently, in plain language. Langy turns that into scenario tests and evaluations, runs them, drafts the fix, and opens the pull request. An engineer approves a diff instead of translating a wish, and the CI run on that PR shows the simulations Langy wrote, passing or failing, so the review is about the change rather than about trust.

Concretely, Langy can:

  • Read through thousands of production conversations to find the patterns in how your agent actually behaves, and cluster them into the problems worth fixing.
  • Write the evaluations and Scenario simulations that pin that behavior down, then run them to see where the agent breaks.
  • Reproduce a single bad trace as a failing test you can keep.
  • Connect to your GitHub and open a pull request that fixes the agent, with the change explained.
  • Prove the fix by running its own simulations in your CI before anyone merges.
  • Handle the rest of the loop too: compare two model or prompt versions, translate prompts across languages, and set up the signals that catch a problem coming back.

Everyone on the team gets something out of that. PMs and domain experts get agency, pun intended: they find the problems, improve the prompts, add the scenarios their domain actually needs. Engineers get domain expertise landing as reviewable pull requests instead of Slack messages, and keep their focus for the genuinely hard problems. And Langy speeds engineers up on the platform too: finding that one trace, spotting the pattern behind it, pulling the metric or the visualization that explains what the agent has been doing in production or in last week's experiment, at a glance instead of an afternoon.

That last part scales further than a person can. Point Langy at a few thousand production traces and ask what is going on: it clusters the topics, sets up signals for the patterns worth watching, and comes back with findings and a proposal for what to do about each. The alternative was an engineer sampling a handful by hand and extrapolating.

"AI engineer" is a crowded claim this year, and skepticism is the right reaction to one more of them. Most of what ships under the name is a chat box on top of dashboards. Langy has hands, and it shows its work: a pull request on a real repo and a green CI run on tests it wrote itself.

This week we will be launching videos, tutorials, and more on how to use Langy. Stay tuned.

One detail we like: every Langy run is itself an agent run, traced, costed, and evaluated inside LangWatch like any other, so we watch Langy work with the same tools you will use to watch yours.

Langy is rolling out to LangWatch teams now. If you want it on your agent, book a demo and we will set it up with you.

blocks.html_en: Today we are launching Langy, an AI engineer that works inside LangWatch. It is a full coding agent: it reads your production traces, writes Scenario tests and evaluations against what it finds, connects to your GitHub, opens a pull request on your actual codebase, and proves the change by running the simulations it wrote in your CI. sentences.en: Today we are launching Langy, an AI engineer that works inside LangWatch.
sentences.zh: 今天，我们推出了 Langy，一位在 LangWatch 内部工作的人工智能工程师。

sentences.en: It is a full coding agent: it reads your production traces, writes Scenario tests and evaluations against what it finds, connects to your GitHub, opens a pull request on your actual codebase, and proves the change by running the simulations it wrote in your CI.

sentences.en: You talk to it where your evaluation results already live, and what comes back is a diff with green checks attached.
sentences.zh: 你可以在评估结果已经存在的地方与它交谈，返回的是带有绿色勾号的差异。

sentences.en: It kicked off the Scenario simulations itself.
sentences.zh: 它本身启动了场景模拟。

blocks.html_en: • Prove the fix by running its own simulations in your CI before anyone merges.

sentences.en: Prove the fix by running its own simulations in your CI before anyone merges.
sentences.zh: 在任何人合并之前，通过在 CI 中运行自己的模拟来证明修复。

sentences.en: Handle the rest of the loop too: compare two model or prompt versions, translate prompts across languages, and set up the signals that catch a problem coming back.
sentences.zh: 还处理循环的其余部分：比较两个模型或提示版本，跨语言翻译提示，并设置捕获问题返回的信号。

PMs and domain experts get agency, pun intended: they find the problems, improve the prompts, add the scenarios their domain actually needs. And Langy speeds engineers up on the platform too: finding that one trace, spotting the pattern behind it, pulling the metric or the visualization that explains what the agent has been doing in production or in last week's experiment, at a glance instead of an afternoon.

sentences.zh: 团队中的每个人都从中有所收获。

sentences.en: PMs and domain experts get agency, pun intended: they find the problems, improve the prompts, add the scenarios their domain actually needs.
sentences.zh: 产品经理和领域专家获得代理权，一语双关：他们发现问题，改进提示，添加其领域实际需要的场景。

sentences.en: Engineers get domain expertise landing as reviewable pull requests instead of Slack messages, and keep their focus for the genuinely hard problems.
sentences.zh: 工程师将领域专业知识作为可审查的拉取请求而不是 Slack 消息登陆，并将注意力集中在真正的难题上。

sentences.en: And Langy speeds engineers up on the platform too: finding that one trace, spotting the pattern behind it, pulling the metric or the visualization that explains what the agent has been doing in production or in last week's experiment, at a glance instead of an afternoon.
sentences.zh: Langy 还加快了工程师在平台上的速度：一目了然地找到一条痕迹，发现其背后的模式，提取解释代理在生产或上周实验中所做的事情的指标或可视化，而不是一下午。

blocks.html_en: That last part scales further than a person can. Point Langy at a few thousand production traces and ask what is going on: it clusters the topics, sets up signals for the patterns worth watching, and comes back with findings and a proposal for what to do about each. The alternative was an engineer sampling a handful by hand and extrapolating.

sentences.en: That last part scales further than a person can.
sentences.zh: 最后一部分的规模比人的规模更大。

sentences.en: Point Langy at a few thousand production traces and ask what is going on: it clusters the topics, sets up signals for the patterns worth watching, and comes back with findings and a proposal for what to do about each.
sentences.zh: 将 Langy 指向几千个生产跟踪并询问发生了什么：它对主题进行聚类，为值得关注的模式设置信号，并返回结果和针对每个跟踪的建议。

sentences.en: The alternative was an engineer sampling a handful by hand and extrapolating.
sentences.zh: 另一种方法是由工程师手工采样并进行推断。

blocks.html_en: "AI engineer" is a crowded claim this year, and skepticism is the right reaction to one more of them. Most of what ships under the name is a chat box on top of dashboards. Langy has hands, and it shows its work: a pull request on a real repo and a green CI run on tests it wrote itself.

sentences.en: "AI engineer" is a crowded claim this year, and skepticism is the right reaction to one more of them.
sentences.zh: “人工智能工程师”是今年的一个热门称呼，而对其中的另一个称呼持怀疑态度是正确的反应。

sentences.en: Most of what ships under the name is a chat box on top of dashboards.
sentences.zh: 该名称下的大部分内容都是仪表板顶部的聊天框。

sentences.en: Langy has hands, and it shows its work: a pull request on a real repo and a green CI run on tests it wrote itself.
sentences.zh: Langy 有双手，它展示了它的工作：对真实存储库的拉取请求以及在它自己编写的测试上运行的绿色 CI。

blocks.html_en: This week we will be launching videos, tutorials, and more on how to use Langy. Stay tuned.

sentences.en: This week we will be launching videos, tutorials, and more on how to use Langy.
sentences.zh: 本周我们将推出有关如何使用 Langy 的视频、教程等。

sentences.en: Stay tuned.
sentences.zh: 敬请关注。

blocks.html_en: One detail we like: every Langy run is itself an agent run, traced, costed, and evaluated inside LangWatch like any other, so we watch Langy work with the same tools you will use to watch yours.

sentences.en: One detail we like: every Langy run is itself an agent run, traced, costed, and evaluated inside LangWatch like any other, so we watch Langy work with the same tools you will use to watch yours.
sentences.zh: 我们喜欢的一个细节是：每次 Langy 运行本身就是一次代理运行，与其他运行一样，在 LangWatch 内进行跟踪、成本计算和评估，因此我们可以使用与您观看自己的运行相同的工具来观察 Langy 的工作。

blocks.html_en: Langy is rolling out to LangWatch teams now. If you want it on your agent, book a demo and we will set it up with you.

sentences.en: Langy is rolling out to LangWatch teams now.
sentences.zh: Langy 现在正在向 LangWatch 团队推出。

sentences.en: If you want it on your agent, book a demo and we will set it up with you.
sentences.zh: 如果您希望您的代理能够使用它，请预订演示，我们将与您一起进行设置。

content_html_zh:
今天，我们推出了 Langy，一位在 LangWatch 内部工作的人工智能工程师。 它是一个完整的编码代理：它读取您的生产跟踪，根据它找到的内容编写场景测试和评估，连接到您的 GitHub，在您的实际代码库上打开拉取请求，并通过运行它在 CI 中编写的模拟来证明更改。 你可以在评估结果已经存在的地方与它交谈，返回的是带有绿色勾号的差异。

我们用它做的第一件事是：我们通过 MCP 将 Langy 连接到机器人，并要求它测试我们自己的客户支持语音代理。 它本身启动了场景模拟。

人工智能已经将软件推向了以前从未接触过的领域。 代理人从事的是法律工作、卫生工作、金融工作，而建造它们的工程师不是律师、医生或银行家。 领域专家对软件团队来说比以往任何时候都更重要，但在大多数团队中，他们仍然无法做出改变：任何有价值的代理都足以完成这项工作，都是复杂的，背后有评估管道和场景套件，而改进它意味着接触代码并拥有人工智能工程专业知识来做好它。

这个市场上的每个平台，包括我们的平台，都承诺进行合作。 在实践中，领域专家仍然通过电子表格和 Slack 消息进行协作，而工程师则成为其他人想要尝试的每个假设的瓶颈。 工程师也不想要这份工作。没有人成为人工智能工程师来翻译其他人的即时调整。

兰吉就是我们的答案。 使之成为可能的变化是编码代理变得真正优秀，而 LangWatch 成长为代理测试、评估和改进已经发生的平台。 当你的代理变得复杂时，工作会同时发生在两个地方：平台和代码库，而 Langy 在这两个地方都很擅长。 PM 或领域专家用简单的语言描述代理应该采取哪些不同的做法。 Langy 将其转化为场景测试和评估，运行它们，起草修复程序，并打开拉取请求。 工程师批准差异而不是翻译愿望，并且在该 PR 上运行的 CI 显示 Langy 编写的模拟，通过或失败，因此审查是关于更改而不是信任。

具体来说，兰吉可以：

  • 通读数千个生产对话，找到代理实际行为的模式，并将它们集中到值得解决的问题中。
  • 编写确定该行为的评估和场景模拟，然后运行它们以查看代理在哪里出现问题。
  • 重现单个错误跟踪作为您可以保留的失败测试。
  • 连接到您的 GitHub 并打开修复代理的拉取请求，并解释更改。
  • 在任何人合并之前，通过在 CI 中运行自己的模拟来证明修复。
  • 还处理循环的其余部分：比较两个模型或提示版本，跨语言翻译提示，并设置捕获问题返回的信号。

团队中的每个人都从中有所收获。 产品经理和领域专家获得代理权，一语双关：他们发现问题，改进提示，添加其领域实际需要的场景。 工程师将领域专业知识作为可审查的拉取请求而不是 Slack 消息登陆，并将注意力集中在真正的难题上。 Langy 还加快了工程师在平台上的速度：一目了然地找到一条痕迹，发现其背后的模式，提取解释代理在生产或上周实验中所做的事情的指标或可视化，而不是一下午。

最后一部分的规模比人的规模更大。 将 Langy 指向几千个生产跟踪并询问发生了什么：它对主题进行聚类，为值得关注的模式设置信号，并返回结果和针对每个跟踪的建议。 另一种方法是由工程师手工采样并进行推断。

“人工智能工程师”是今年的一个热门称呼，而对其中的另一个称呼持怀疑态度是正确的反应。 该名称下的大部分内容都是仪表板顶部的聊天框。 Langy 有双手，它展示了它的工作：对真实存储库的拉取请求以及在它自己编写的测试上运行的绿色 CI。

本周我们将推出有关如何使用 Langy 的视频、教程等。 敬请关注。

我们喜欢的一个细节是：每次 Langy 运行本身就是一次代理运行，与其他运行一样，在 LangWatch 内进行跟踪、成本计算和评估，因此我们可以使用与您观看自己的运行相同的工具来观察 Langy 的工作。

Langy 现在正在向 LangWatch 团队推出。 如果您希望您的代理能够使用它，请预订演示，我们将与您一起进行设置。
